SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa.entity

Class JpaField

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.entity.JpaField
public class JpaField extends Object
Represents metadata for a JPA entity field.

Encapsulates details such as field name, type, column mapping, and persistence-related annotations.

Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda
